leaf.title: Break circular import between cli router and units registry
leaf.content:
list-units made cli/router.py import units/registry.py while the temperature router change made registry import router constants — a cycle that kills test collection. Extract the shared constants into a leaf module neither side re-imports.

Files: unitconv/cli/router.py, unitconv/units/registry.py, unitconv/units/constants.py

Acceptance criteria:
- pytest collects and runs the full suite again
- no module imports its own importer (assert with an import-order test)

Test expectations: restore green collection; add an import-cycle guard test

actions.rationale: Cycle exists only in the combined state; neither leaf alone reproduces it.
